_description: Entry quality tuning v1: context gates applied to ALL engines + SHORT quality gate + confidence floor + DOA blacklist + choppy regime floor. Derived from entry-quality-analysis.py (1,462 trades Jul 2025 - Feb 2026).

deep_audit_vix_ceiling.reason: Block entries when VIX > 35 (extreme fear). VIX 28-31 is elevated but tradable; danger score handles soft gating at VIX>25. Now applies to ALL engines.

deep_audit_block_regime.reason: DISABLED for entry-tuned-v1. Regime handled by DOA gate and danger scoring, not hard-block.

tt_spy_directional_gate.reason: DISABLED for entry-tuned-v1. Gate was only validated for tt_core; needs separate validation for ripster_core.

deep_audit_danger_max_signals.reason: DISABLED for entry-tuned-v1. Danger score still computed (for sizing) but does not hard-block. DOA gate covers structural alignment.

deep_audit_danger_ema_depth_min.reason: 1H EMA depth minimum for danger scoring.

deep_audit_danger_vix_threshold.reason: VIX threshold for danger signal counting.

deep_audit_danger_min_st_aligned.reason: Minimum SuperTrend timeframes aligned with trade direction.

deep_audit_danger_div_enabled.reason: Enable RSI divergence checking in danger score.

doa_gate_enabled.reason: DOA structural gate: block when Daily + 4H ST both against direction.

tt_pdz_hard_gate.reason: PDZ gate disabled for now — needs more backtesting data.

short_min_rank.reason: SHORT entries require rank >= 75. All SHORT paths have >50% DOA rate; only allow high-conviction shorts.

short_require_daily_st_aligned.reason: SHORT entries require Daily SuperTrend bearish (stDir=-1). Prevents shorting against daily trend.

short_min_4h_ema_depth.reason: SHORT entries require 4H EMA depth >= 5. Ensures meaningful bearish structure on 4H.

min_entry_confidence.reason: Block entries with confidence < 0.5. Confidence 0.4 has 60.5% DOA rate vs 43% at 0.6.

entry_ticker_blacklist.reason: Tickers with historically >75% DOA rate across all engines.

choppy_regime_rank_floor.reason: DISABLED for entry-tuned-v1. Rank floor too restrictive when combined with other gates.

deep_audit_mfe_safety_trim_pct.reason: Trim at 2% MFE to capture profits before reversal.

deep_audit_stall_breakeven_pnl_pct.reason: Stalled trades with PnL < 0.3% after stall hours should exit.

deep_audit_max_runner_drawdown_pct.reason: Max drawdown from peak before exit.

deep_audit_post_trim_trail_pct.reason: After first trim, trail at 2% from peak.

deep_audit_post_trim_breakeven.reason: After any trim, move SL to at least breakeven.

deep_audit_phase_peak_extreme.reason: Phase oscillator peak threshold for exit consideration.

deep_audit_phase_decline_extreme.reason: Phase must decline 20 from peak to confirm reversal.

deep_audit_loss_cooldown_hours.reason: Wait 4h after a loss before re-entering same ticker.
